visual_description: Two men sit inside a dimly lit car at night, the driver looking ahead while the passenger turns to speak. The scene then cuts to a brightly lit convenience store where a man and a woman embrace near shelves and a Marlboro sign.
audio_description: The audio includes the low hum of the car engine and faint conversation between the men. It then transitions to the ambient noise of a busy store.
